SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:17am
Judge Pro Tem Michael J Raifsnider, clerk-Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal, Appellant, Evan Bailyn, appears in Pro Per. Respondent, Stanley Dintcho appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Raifsnider.

EXHR(A):Rent ledger
(B):Rental agreement

EXHA(1):Letter to partner about rental property
(2):Rental agreement
(3):Letter to Dintcho
(4):Letter (email)

Witness for appellant: Carol Rodensky, Real Estate Agent.

Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

Judge Pro Tem Michael Raifsnider, clerk - K. Liu, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Evan Bailyn dba First Page Sage present in pro per. Respondent not present. Party previously sworn. Case under submission.



9:38am
Case submitted.
